ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: All`Illustrissimo Sig. Gio. Francesco Loredano Nobile Veneto.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: This is part of the following volume: La Lucerna di Eureta Misoscolo aggiuntovi la Messalina di Francesco Pona. In Parigi. The British Library Integrated catalogue gives 1630 as the date of publication. Both Pona`s dedication and printer`s forward in Messalina, are the same as in previous editions.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
